# Edge Case Action

<p align="right">
  <img src="https://github.com/marketplace/actions/Edge+Case+Action/icon" alt="" height="50"/>
</p>

> Composite action testing edge YAML and schema features (anchors, aliases, special values).

## Usage

<code>
- uses: your-org/@main
  with:
    input_with_alias: # Input using YAML alias (default: anchored-default)
    input_with_anchor: # Input using YAML anchor (default: anchored-default)
    input_with_bool_string: # Input that looks like a boolean (default: false)
    input_with_number_string: # Input that looks like a number (default: 123)
    input_with_special_chars: # Special chars: !@#$%^&*()[]{} (default: !@#$%^&*()[]{})
</code>

## Inputs

- **input_with_alias**: Input using YAML alias (default: anchored-default)

- **input_with_anchor**: Input using YAML anchor (default: anchored-default)

- **input_with_bool_string**: Input that looks like a boolean (default: false)

- **input_with_number_string**: Input that looks like a number (default: 123)

- **input_with_special_chars**: Special chars: !@#$%^&*()[]{} (default: !@#$%^&*()[]{})

## Outputs

- **output_with_alias**: Output using YAML alias

- **output_with_anchor**: Output using YAML anchor

- **output_with_special_chars**: Output: []{}!@#

## Example

See the [action.yml](./action.yml) for a full reference.
